tasks.question: Complete Gate-0 target profile from current journal/standard requirements
tasks.notes: Must pass before retrieval/analysis for journal-targeted work.

tasks.question: Define one scoped research question and population
tasks.notes: Avoid multi-question runs in one manuscript.

tasks.question: Retrieve and screen literature with verification-first workflow
tasks.notes: Set passes=true only after retrieval and citation consistency checks pass.

tasks.question: Run feasibility scoring and lock synthesis mode
tasks.notes: If go=false for requested mode, pivot before writing.

tasks.question: Build exemplar benchmark and writing blueprint for target venue
Draft manuscript core narrative and analytical results
tasks.notes: Center the narrative on field progress and findings, not pipeline logs.

tasks.question: Run dynamic style gate and prose-quality gate
tasks.notes: Both verdicts must pass before DECISION/PUBLISH claims.

tasks.question: Run content-focus and citation-architecture gates
tasks.notes: Fail if writing reads as technical report instead of content-first synthesis.

tasks.question: Plan/apply main-text and supplement split
tasks.notes: Publish gate requires technical-heavy sections to be split when flagged.

tasks.question: Run triad review (editor, methods, domain) and revision loop
tasks.notes: Required for top-tier submission quality bar.

tasks.question: Compile PDF and finalize reproducibility package
tasks.notes: Do not mark complete until all required contracts pass.
